findings.title: maxDelaySeconds=600 default + CEL rejects base>600 with max omitted
findings.note: Behavior change confirmed via envtest against the PR CRDs. Green on PR head.

liveNote: L2 uses isolated envtest (its own API server + the PR config/crd/bases). The shared sandbox cluster was intentionally NOT modified. envtest assets: setup-envtest use 1.31.0 --bin-dir ./bin.
